name: micro-consequence-pov
description: Focused checks for immediate physical consequences, stable location, and unambiguous narrative viewpoint.
narrator_directives: Use third person throughout. Resolve the final physical action before adding atmosphere.

events.action: I move an empty cup from the center of our table to its left edge

events.speech: Mork, please close the nearest open window.
events.action: I remain seated and wait for his response
I stand, walk three steps to the door, and stop without opening it
